headline: Cadence Design Systems (CDNS) Valuation Check As Short Term Momentum Cools
summary: Event context and recent stock performance Cadence Design Systems (CDNS) has seen mixed recent share performance, with a small move over the past week and declines over the past month and past 3 months. This has prompted some investors to reassess the current setup. See our latest analysis for Cadence Design Systems. At a share price of $279.48, Cadence’s short term momentum has cooled, with a 30 day share price return of 5.88% and a 90 day share price return of 12.81%. The 1 year total...
